title: قرار مجلس إدارة الهيئة الاتحادية للرقابة النووية رقم 5: بشأن منح شركة الإمارات للطاقة النووية ش.م.ع. الترخيص لاختيار موقع تشييد مرافق نووية
short_name: قرار مجلس إدارة الهيئة الاتحادية للرقابة النووية 5/2024

provisions.content: (1) منالقانون، وهواختيارالموقعلتشييد مرفقنووي؛ وبناءًعلى مراجعةوتوصية مديرعام الهيئةلمجلس إدارةالهيئة عملاًب

provisions.title: قرّرمايلي
provisions.content: (5) منالقانونوبناءً علىموافقة مجلسإدارة الهيئةخلال اجتماعهرقم (2) لسنة 2024المنعقد في 16فبراير 2024؛قرّرمايلي :المادةالأولىعملاًبالمواد 5، 6، 23،24، 25، 28، و 32 منالقانون، منحشركةالإماراتللطاقةالنووية ش.م.ع"ترخيصلاختيار موقعتشييد مرافقنووية" (ترخيصرقم:FANR/NF/2024/01)كما هو وارد فيالملحق 1 بهذاالقرار.

provisions.title: الموافق:6/شعبان/1445هـ
provisions.content:
يدخلهذا القرارحيز التنفيذاعتباراً منتاريخ إصدارهويُنشر فيالجريدةالرسمية.صدرفيأبوظبي
بتاريخ:16/فبراير/2024
الموافق:6/شعبان/1445هـعبداللهالسويديرئيسمجلسالإدارةنشرهذا القرار فيعدد الجريدةالرسمية رقم770.ص59.ResolutionNo. (5) of 2024 of the Board of Management of the Federal Authority for NuclearRegulationGrantingEmirates Nuclear Energy Company PJ.S.CtheLicence of the Selection of a Site forConstructionof Nuclear FacilitiesTheBoard of Management of the Federal Authority for Nuclear Regulation("FANR"):Havingconsidered:•Federal Law by Decree No. (6) of 2009 Concerning the Peaceful Uses ofNuclear Energy (the "Law");• AbuDhabi Law No. (8) of 2021 Concerning Emirates Nuclear Energy Company "PublicJoint Stock Company";• CabinetResolution No. (47m/1g) of 2024 on the Renewal of the Formation of the Board ofManagement of the Federal Authority for Nuclear Regulation;• CabinetResolution No. (2/9g) of 2020 on the Guide to Board Governance in the UAEFederal Government;-Cabinet Resolution No. (12/6g) of 2021 Concerning Request to Exempt the FederalAuthority for Nuclear Regulation from the Enforcement of Some of the Provisionsof the Guide to Board Governance in the UAE Federal Government, ApprovedPursuant to the Cabinet Resolution No. (2/9g) of 2020;-FANR's Board of Management Resolution No. (15) of 2021 on Amendment No. 4 of theBy-Laws Regulating the Meetings of the Board of Management of the FederalAuthority for Nuclear Regulation; and-"Application for Site Selection Licence" submitted by Emirates Nuclear EnergyCompany PJ.S.C. constituting the application for a licence to conduct theregulated activity stated in Article 25(1) of the Law, namely selection of asite for the construction of a nuclear facility; andBasedon the review and recommendation of FANR's Director General provided to FANR'sBoard of Management pursuant to Article 15(5) of the Law and based on FANR'sBoard of Management approval during its meeting No. (02) of 2024 held on 16February 2024,Hasdecided the following:Article1Pursuantto Articles 5, 6, 23, 24, 25, 28 and 32 of the Law, to grant to Emirates NuclearEnergy Company P J.S.C. 'Licence for the Selection of a Site for theConstruction of Nuclear Facilities' (Licence No. FANR/NF/2024/001) as providedin Annex 1 to this Resolution.Article2ThisResolution shall come into force as of the date of its issuance and shall bepublished in the Official Gazette.Issuedin Abu Dhabi
Date: 16 February 2024
Corresponding to: 06 Shaban 1445HAbdullaAl Suwaidi ChairmanLicenceNo: FANR/NF/2024/001Licencefor the Selection of a Site for the Construction ofNuclearFacilitiesUnderthe powers provided in Articles (5), (6) and (28)(3)(a) of the Federal Law byDecree No. 6 of 2009 Concerning the Peaceful Uses of Nuclear Energy (the Law),and having considered that the proposed activities of Emirates Nuclear EnergyCompany P.J.S.C. comply with the requirements of the Law and applicableregulations of the Federal Authority for Nuclear Regulation (the Authority), theAuthority, having considered a graded approach to the authorisation of RegulatedActivities based on Safety, hereby grants this Licence for the selection of asite for the Construction of the Nuclear Facilities that will contain NuclearReactor(s) (the Licence) to:EmiratesNuclear Energy Company P.J.S.C. (the Licensee)beinga public joint stock company (industrial licence No: IN-1002171) establishedpursuant to the Abu Dhabi Law No. 8 of 2021 on Emirates Nuclear Energy Company"Public Joint Stock Company (P.J.S.C)".ThisLicence authorises the Licensee to conduct the following Regulated Activity setforth in Article 25(1) of the Law:Selectionof a site for the Construction of a Nuclear Facilityasspecified in Schedule of 1 of this Licence. The Licence conditions are set forthIn Schedule 2. The description of the Regulated Activity is provided in theLicence application documents referenced in Schedule 3. Schedule 4 providesinterpretation of certain terms used in this Licence.ThisLicence shall remain in force until:a) itis suspended or revoked by the Authority; orb) itis amended by the Authority; orc) itis surrendered by the Licensee, subject to acceptance by the Authority; ord) theAuthority grants a licence for the Construction of the Nuclear Facility at theselected site.ThisLicence is granted without prejudice to any future decision of the Authorityregarding the following:a) preparationof a site for the Construction of the Nuclear Facilities that will containNuclear Reactor(s); orb) Constructionof the Nuclear Facilities that will contain Nuclear Reactor(s).Issuedin Abu Dhabi
16 February 2024AbdullaAl SuwaidiChairmanof the Board of Management ofthe Federal AuthorityforNuclear RegulationThisLicence comprises this page, the preceding pages and the following schedules,which together form an integral part of the Licence:Schedule1: (1 page) Regulated Activities AuthorisedSchedule2: (1 page) Licence ConditionsSchedule3: (1 page) Application DocumentsSchedule4: (1 page) Interpretation.Anyreference to 'schedule' in the Licence means a reference to a schedule of thisLicence.Schedule1RegulatedActivities Authorised1- ThisLicence authorises the selection of a site in the State for the Construction ofthe Nuclear Facilities that will contain Nuclear Reactor(s), which shall includeonly the regional analysis and identification of potential sites; screening ofpotential sites and identification of candidate sites; and evaluation ofcandidate sites so as to characterize fully the site-specific conditionspertinent to the Safety and security of a Nuclear Facility and activitiesreasonably associated with the foregoing.2- TheLicensee is required to obtain all necessary Licence(s) from the Authority forthe conduct of any other Regulated Activity.3- TheLicensee shall obtain all necessary licences, permits and authorisations fromother government entities for the conduct of any Regulated Activities authorisedby the Authority under this Licence and update the Authority on any changerelating to the aforementioned licences, permits and authorisations.Schedule2LicenceConditionsThisLicence is subject to and the Licensee shall comply with the Licence conditionsspecified and incorporated below:1- TheLicensee shall conduct the Regulated Activity authorised by this Licence inaccordance with:a) theLaw, and any amendments thereto;b) anyapplicable regulations issued by the Authority pursuant to the Law;c) theterms and conditions of this Licence; andd) thedocuments referenced in and/or submitted with the application for this Licence(the Application Documents).2- TheLicensee shall notify the Authority of any modification to Safety-relatedaspects of the Application Documents at least thirty (30) days prior to theirimplementation. Such modifications shall be subject to the Authority'sre-assessment and approval.3- TheLicensee shall provide the Authority with a plan and timetable for specificactivities to be undertaken under the general authority of this Licence at leastthirty (30) days prior to such activities commencing.4- TheLicensee shall provide the Authority with access to any place, to any documentor to any authorised person, and shall provide all assistance necessary toenable the Authority to conduct Inspections in accordance with Articles (5),(35) and (36) of the Law.5- TheLicensee shall provide to the Authority within one (1) month of the end of eachcalendar year, a report on the Regulated Activity carried out under this Licenceduring the previous year.6- TheLicensee shall retain any Safety-related records during the conduct of theRegulated Activity authorised by the Authority under this Licence during thelifetime of the Nuclear Facility.7- TheLicensee shall take into consideration the potential impact of climate change onthe candidate site related hazards when performing the authorised RegulatedActivities.Schedule3ApplicationDocuments1-Emirates Nuclear Energy Company Public Joint Stock Company - Application forSite Selection Licence (letter ref. no.: ENA-FANR-23-0061L, dated 27 September2023).Schedule4Interpretation1-Capitalized terms used but not defined in this Licence shall have the meaningascribed to them in Article (1) of the Federal Law by Decree No. 6 of 2009Concerning the Peaceful Uses of Nuclear Energy.
